# MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData.content(_:)

**Case**

The location of a validation image you use to validate the model.

## Declaration

```swift
case content(URL)
```

## Designating validation data

- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none**: An empty validation dataset you use to skip model validation.
